title: Preparation of f/2 Medium for Algal Cultures
author: Roscoff Culture Collection
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s26eghe

steps.instruction: Filter 1L of old seawater of at least two months on prefilter and 0.2 µm filter Heat seawater during 10/20 min at 100°C (pasteurisation) Let the water cool down Under laminar flow hood, , add 25 mL of Guillard’s (f/2) Marine Water Enrichment Solution (Sigma-Aldrich G9903) Filter the medium on 0,2 µm Guillard’s (F/2) Marine Water Enrichment Solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G0154-500ML
